eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Arizona; at 4:42 PM on JUL 8, 2026 Effective until 12:42 AM JUL 9, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety.  A SAFE Alert has been issued for Maricopa County.  The Phoenix Police Department is looking for 84 year old Charles White.  Charles is a white male, 5 feet 6 inches tall, 99 pounds, and has brown hair with blue eyes.  He was last seen wearing a gray shirt, blue jeans and a tan fisherman hat.  Charles was last seen at 9:00 PM on July 6, 2026, on foot near 29th Street and Juniper Avenue in Phoenix, Arizona.  Charles has a medical condition which may cause him to become lost or easily confused.  If you have seen Charles, please contact the Phoenix Police Department at 602-534-3052 or call 911. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
